title: Customer Placing the Largest Number of Orders
description: Find the customer with the most orders.
constraints: order_number is the primary key of Orders
There is guaranteed to be exactly one customer with the most orders (no tie at the top)
key_concept: GROUP BY + ORDER BY COUNT DESC + LIMIT 1. Top-1 pattern.

hints.L1: Count orders per customer, sort descending, take the top 1.
hints.L2: SELECT customer_number FROM Orders GROUP BY customer_number ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1
hints.L3: SELECT customer_number FROM Orders GROUP BY customer_number ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1

optimal_solution: SELECT customer_number FROM Orders GROUP BY customer_number ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;
